title: Verifier Verdict v1 (B15.D)
description: Strict JSON output schema for the VERIFIER spawn (4th review-sibling). The verifier's last stdout line MUST be a JSON object conforming to this schema. The B15.B done_status_guard SQLite trigger checks json_extract(verifier_verdict_json, '$.overall') == 'pass' for every scope-2/3 subtask done-transition; the autonomous-loop done-path also short-circuits to status='failed' when overall='fail-impl' or 'fail-spec'.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking change; spawner / SPS gate on this.

overall.description: Coarse-grained binary verdict for the SPS done_status_guard trigger. `pass` iff verdict=='pass'; `fail` for fail-impl / fail-spec / uncertain (uncertain second-attempt is also `fail`). The trigger reads json_extract(..., '$.overall').

verdict.description: Fine-grained verdict driving slot-manager routing. `fail-impl` => re-dispatch implementor with feedback. `fail-spec` => re-decompose parent. `uncertain` => second-attempt or treat-as-fail-impl.

acceptance_criteria_verdicts.description: One row per AC in spec; positionally aligned with the implementor's acceptance_criteria_self_cert[] for diff comparison.

tests_required_verdicts.description: One row per test in spec; verifier RAN each test in the fresh worktree.

tests_run_verdict.description: Convenience: TRUE iff every entry in tests_required_verdicts[].verdict == 'passing'. The B15.B done_status_guard does NOT read this directly (it gates on $.overall) but the autonomous-loop guard reads it for the 4-way AND.

file_scope_verdict.description: TRUE iff out_of_scope_files_touched[] is empty (i.e. every changed file was inside FILE SCOPE).

reasons.description: Free-form list of reason strings the SPS surfaces as the failure error message. Empty when overall=='pass'.

blocking.description: Mirror of the prompt's `blocking` flag — TRUE for autonomous-loop, FALSE for operator-routed. Lets the SPS know whether to enforce the verdict.

verifier_worktree_cleaned_up.description: Self-attestation that the verifier worktree was removed before exit. The spawner ALSO cleans up via trap as defence-in-depth.
